name: Blue Cheese Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons butter, chilled and cut into 6 pieces
1/4 lb. bacon, diced, cooked until crisp, then crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2 For the crust: Blend flour and butter together until it forms a coarse meal. Add egg and mix until clumpy. Press into a 13" x 9-inch cake pan (very thin). Bake for 10 minutes (it may crack) and cool completely.
3 For the filling: Beat cream cheese until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Pour the mixture over the cooled crust.
4 Bake for 20 minutes. Allow to cool to room temperature and chill overnight.
Recipe by Patricia Lidicker of Milwaukee
